enriched_points.expanded_content: Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) evaluates environmental impacts of building materials from extraction to disposal, enabling informed choices that support sustainability in construction projects.
Incorporating LCA into the construction sector aligns with evolving regulations aimed at reducing carbon footprints, ensuring compliance and promoting responsible material usage.
Utilizing LCA fosters long-term sustainability by minimizing resource depletion and waste, contributing to circular economy principles in the construction industry.
